Aloha 🤙🏽

name: Diamond Head Tennis Center
description:
Please stack your paddles at the court 8 paddle rack. James Douglas onsite USAPA ambassador present most days. 

There are 4 courts with portable nets during open play times. Court 11 is a permanent net shared with paddle tennis players and on the play clock (45min allowed if someone is waiting). Courts ae often occupied by a large group from the Oahu pickleball league, leaving only 2 or 3 courts available for drop in. In addition there is a company operating a pickleball school that reserves one of the courts frequently. We encourage:

-play with aloha
-games are played sideout scoring to 11 (win by 2)
-no double stacking paddles
-no reserving paddle positions for others

Mahalo for your kokua!

name: Pickles at Forté
description: Pickles at Forté is Hawai‘i’s only fully air-conditioned indoor pickleball facility, located in the heart of downtown Honolulu. Featuring 14 state-of-the-art acrylic hard courts, the venue offers a premium playing experience—rain or shine. Players can reserve courts, drop in for open play, or even rent out courts for private events such as parties, team-building sessions, and corporate gatherings. On-site amenities include food and beverages, restrooms, water stations, a pro shop, certified trainers, youth programming, and full wheelchair accessibility. Whether you're a seasoned competitor or trying pickleball for the first time, Pickles at Forté provides a comfortable, vibrant, and community-driven environment to play and connect.
fees: Fee required — Monthly Memberships and Day Passes Available
